# 02 — Database Design

SQL Server, EF Core Code-First migrations. All monetary columns `decimal(18,2)`. All tables have `Id (uniqueidentifier, PK, default newsequentialid())`, `CreatedAtUtc`, `CreatedBy`, `ModifiedAtUtc`, `ModifiedBy` unless noted. Soft-delete via `IsDeleted bit` + global EF query filter (nothing is hard-deleted, in support of the audit/compliance requirement).

## 2.1 Shared / Identity / Licensing Tables

```sql
-- ASP.NET Identity tables (AspNetUsers, AspNetRoles, AspNetUserRoles, AspNetUserClaims,
-- AspNetRoleClaims, AspNetUserTokens) generated by IdentityDbContext — extended:

AspNetUsers  (extended IdentityUser)
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  FullName          nvarchar(200)     not null
  ChapterOrBranch    nvarchar(100)     null      -- e.g. "KL", "Penang"
  IsActive          bit               not null default 1
  LastLoginAtUtc    datetime2         null
  -- + Identity base columns (Email, PasswordHash, PhoneNumber, etc.)

Roles (custom, separate from AspNetRoles — see 06_RBAC_Auth.md for why both exist)
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  Name              nvarchar(100)     not null unique   -- Admin, Accountant, SalesUser, InventoryManager, Manager, Viewer
  Description       nvarchar(500)     null

Permissions
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  Module            nvarchar(50)      not null   -- Accounting | Sales | Inventory | Admin
  Operation         nvarchar(50)      not null   -- Create | Read | Update | Delete | Approve | Export
  Code              nvarchar(100)     not null unique  -- e.g. "Accounting.GLEntry.Create"

RolePermissions
  RoleId            uniqueidentifier FK -> Roles.Id
  PermissionId      uniqueidentifier FK -> Permissions.Id
  PRIMARY KEY (RoleId, PermissionId)

UserRoles (custom join, distinct from AspNetUserRoles which Identity still uses for [Authorize])
  UserId            uniqueidentifier FK -> AspNetUsers.Id
  RoleId            uniqueidentifier FK -> Roles.Id
  PRIMARY KEY (UserId, RoleId)

Licenses
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  ProductCode       nvarchar(50)      not null   -- AccountingPro | RetailPro | EnterprisePro
  EnabledModules    nvarchar(200)     not null   -- CSV: "Accounting,Sales,Inventory"
  IssuedToCompany   nvarchar(200)     not null
  IssuedAtUtc       datetime2         not null
  ExpiresAtUtc      datetime2         not null
  LicenseKey        nvarchar(500)     not null   -- signed token, validated at startup

AuditLogs   (see 07_Audit_Trail.md for full design)
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  EntityName        nvarchar(100)     not null
  EntityId          nvarchar(100)     not null
  Action            nvarchar(20)      not null   -- Create | Update | Delete | Approve | Login | PermissionChange
  BeforeValuesJson  nvarchar(max)     null
  AfterValuesJson   nvarchar(max)     null
  Reason            nvarchar(500)     null
  UserId            uniqueidentifier  null FK -> AspNetUsers.Id
  IpAddress         nvarchar(45)      null
  UserAgent         nvarchar(500)     null
  TimestampUtc      datetime2         not null
  -- Immutable: no UPDATE/DELETE permission granted to app role at DB level (see 07)

Notifications
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  UserId            uniqueidentifier FK -> AspNetUsers.Id
  Title             nvarchar(200)     not null
  Body              nvarchar(1000)    not null
  IsRead            bit               not null default 0
  Type              nvarchar(50)      not null   -- ApprovalNeeded | PaymentVerified | CertificateReady ...
```

## 2.2 Accounting Module

```sql
Accounts (Chart of Accounts)
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  Code              nvarchar(20)      not null unique   -- e.g. "1000"
  Name              nvarchar(200)     not null
  Type              nvarchar(20)      not null   -- Asset | Liability | Equity | Revenue | Expense
  ParentAccountId   uniqueidentifier  null FK -> Accounts.Id  (self-ref, for sub-accounts)
  IsActive          bit               not null default 1
  Balance           decimal(18,2)     not null default 0   -- denormalized running balance, reconciled nightly

GLEntries (journal entry header)
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  EntryNumber       nvarchar(30)      not null unique   -- sequential, e.g. JE-2026-000123
  EntryDate         date              not null
  Description       nvarchar(500)     not null
  Source            nvarchar(20)      not null   -- Manual | SalesAutoPost | InventoryAutoPost
  SourceReferenceId uniqueidentifier  null       -- InvoiceId / StockMovementId when auto-posted
  Status            nvarchar(20)      not null   -- Draft | Posted | Voided
  PostedAtUtc       datetime2         null
  PostedBy          uniqueidentifier  null FK -> AspNetUsers.Id

GLEntryLines
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  GLEntryId         uniqueidentifier FK -> GLEntries.Id
  AccountId         uniqueidentifier FK -> Accounts.Id
  DebitAmount       decimal(18,2)     not null default 0
  CreditAmount      decimal(18,2)     not null default 0
  LineDescription   nvarchar(500)     null
  CHECK (DebitAmount = 0 OR CreditAmount = 0)   -- a line is either a debit or a credit, never both

TaxCodes
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  Code              nvarchar(20)      not null unique  -- SST-6, SST-0
  Name              nvarchar(100)     not null
  Rate              decimal(5,2)      not null   -- 6.00
  Type              nvarchar(20)      not null   -- SST | IncomeTax

BankAccounts
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  AccountId         uniqueidentifier FK -> Accounts.Id   -- linked GL cash/bank account
  BankName          nvarchar(100)     not null
  AccountNumber     nvarchar(50)      not null
  Currency          nvarchar(3)       not null default 'MYR'

BankStatementLines
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  BankAccountId     uniqueidentifier FK -> BankAccounts.Id
  TransactionDate   date              not null
  Description       nvarchar(500)     not null
  Amount            decimal(18,2)     not null   -- +ve deposit, -ve withdrawal
  IsReconciled      bit               not null default 0
  MatchedGLEntryLineId uniqueidentifier null FK -> GLEntryLines.Id
```

## 2.3 Sales Module

```sql
Customers
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  Code              nvarchar(20)      not null unique
  CompanyName       nvarchar(200)     not null
  ContactPerson     nvarchar(200)     null
  Email             nvarchar(200)     null
  Phone             nvarchar(20)      null       -- +60 format
  Address           nvarchar(500)     null
  CreditLimit       decimal(18,2)     not null default 0
  PaymentTermsDays  int               not null default 30
  IsActive          bit               not null default 1

Invoices
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  InvoiceNumber     nvarchar(30)      not null unique   -- sequential, INV-2026-000045, no gaps
  CustomerId        uniqueidentifier FK -> Customers.Id
  InvoiceDate       date              not null
  DueDate           date              not null
  Status            nvarchar(20)      not null   -- Draft | Issued | PartiallyPaid | Paid | Void | Overdue
  SubTotal          decimal(18,2)     not null
  SSTAmount         decimal(18,2)     not null
  TotalAmount       decimal(18,2)     not null
  AmountPaid        decimal(18,2)     not null default 0
  Notes             nvarchar(1000)    null

InvoiceLines
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  InvoiceId         uniqueidentifier FK -> Invoices.Id
  ProductId         uniqueidentifier FK -> Products.Id   (nullable if Inventory module not licensed — free-text line)
  Description       nvarchar(500)     not null
  Quantity          decimal(18,3)     not null
  UnitPrice         decimal(18,2)     not null
  LineTotal         decimal(18,2)     not null
  TaxCodeId         uniqueidentifier  null FK -> TaxCodes.Id

Payments
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  InvoiceId         uniqueidentifier FK -> Invoices.Id
  PaymentDate       date              not null
  Amount            decimal(18,2)     not null
  Method            nvarchar(30)      not null   -- BankTransfer | Cash | Cheque | OnlineGateway
  ReferenceNumber   nvarchar(100)     null
  Status            nvarchar(20)      not null   -- Pending | Verified | Rejected
  VerifiedBy        uniqueidentifier  null FK -> AspNetUsers.Id
  VerifiedAtUtc     datetime2         null

CreditNotes (returns)
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  CreditNoteNumber  nvarchar(30)      not null unique
  InvoiceId         uniqueidentifier FK -> Invoices.Id
  Reason            nvarchar(500)     not null
  Amount            decimal(18,2)     not null
  Status            nvarchar(20)      not null   -- Draft | Issued | Applied
```

## 2.4 Inventory Module

```sql
Warehouses
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  Code              nvarchar(20)      not null unique
  Name              nvarchar(100)     not null
  Address           nvarchar(500)     null

Products
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  SKU               nvarchar(30)      not null unique
  Name              nvarchar(200)     not null
  Category          nvarchar(100)     null
  UnitOfMeasure     nvarchar(20)      not null   -- pcs, box, kg
  CostPrice         decimal(18,2)     not null
  SellingPrice      decimal(18,2)     not null
  ReorderLevel      decimal(18,3)     not null default 0
  ValuationMethod   nvarchar(20)      not null   -- FIFO | LIFO | WeightedAverage
  IsActive          bit               not null default 1

StockLevels
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  ProductId         uniqueidentifier FK -> Products.Id
  WarehouseId       uniqueidentifier FK -> Warehouses.Id
  QuantityOnHand    decimal(18,3)     not null default 0
  UNIQUE (ProductId, WarehouseId)

StockMovements
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  ProductId         uniqueidentifier FK -> Products.Id
  WarehouseId       uniqueidentifier FK -> Warehouses.Id
  MovementType      nvarchar(20)      not null   -- Purchase | SaleIssue | AdjustmentIn | AdjustmentOut | Transfer
  Quantity          decimal(18,3)     not null   -- always positive; MovementType implies direction
  UnitCost          decimal(18,2)     not null   -- cost at time of movement, per valuation method
  SourceReferenceId uniqueidentifier  null       -- InvoiceId when SaleIssue
  MovementDate      datetime2         not null
  Notes             nvarchar(500)     null

StockValuationLayers (FIFO/LIFO cost layers)
  Id                uniqueidentifier PK
  ProductId         uniqueidentifier FK -> Products.Id
  WarehouseId       uniqueidentifier FK -> Warehouses.Id
  ReceivedDate      datetime2         not null
  QuantityRemaining decimal(18,3)     not null
  UnitCost          decimal(18,2)     not null
```

## 2.5 Key Relationships (ER Summary)

```
AspNetUsers 1───* UserRoles *───1 Roles 1───* RolePermissions *───1 Permissions
AspNetUsers 1───* AuditLogs
AspNetUsers 1───* GLEntries (PostedBy)          Accounts 1───* GLEntryLines
GLEntries   1───* GLEntryLines                  Accounts 1───* Accounts (self-ref parent)
BankAccounts 1───* BankStatementLines ──1 GLEntryLines (matched)

Customers   1───* Invoices 1───* InvoiceLines *───1 Products
Invoices    1───* Payments
Invoices    1───* CreditNotes

Products    1───* StockLevels *───1 Warehouses
Products    1───* StockMovements *───1 Warehouses
Products    1───* StockValuationLayers *───1 Warehouses

Invoices ···(event: InvoicePosted)···> GLEntries [Enterprise Pro only]
StockMovements ···(event: StockMovementRecorded)···> GLEntries [Enterprise Pro only]
```

## 2.6 Indexes (beyond PK/unique constraints already implied above)

```sql
CREATE INDEX IX_GLEntries_EntryDate           ON GLEntries(EntryDate);
CREATE INDEX IX_GLEntries_Status              ON GLEntries(Status);
CREATE INDEX IX_GLEntryLines_AccountId        ON GLEntryLines(AccountId);
CREATE INDEX IX_Invoices_CustomerId_Status    ON Invoices(CustomerId, Status);
CREATE INDEX IX_Invoices_InvoiceDate          ON Invoices(InvoiceDate);
CREATE INDEX IX_Payments_InvoiceId_Status     ON Payments(InvoiceId, Status);
CREATE INDEX IX_StockMovements_ProductId_Date ON StockMovements(ProductId, MovementDate);
CREATE INDEX IX_AuditLogs_EntityName_EntityId ON AuditLogs(EntityName, EntityId);
CREATE INDEX IX_AuditLogs_TimestampUtc        ON AuditLogs(TimestampUtc);
CREATE INDEX IX_AuditLogs_UserId              ON AuditLogs(UserId);
```

## 2.7 Constraints Summary

- PK: every table, `uniqueidentifier` with `newsequentialid()` default (keeps clustered index insert order reasonable).
- FK: `ON DELETE NO ACTION` everywhere (soft-delete pattern means we never want cascade deletes touching financial history) — deactivation is a status flag, not a row removal.
- Unique: `Accounts.Code`, `Invoices.InvoiceNumber`, `Products.SKU`, `Customers.Code`, `Roles.Name`, `Permissions.Code`.
- Check: `GLEntryLines` debit/credit mutual exclusivity (2.2); `Invoices.AmountPaid <= TotalAmount` (app-level, enforced in domain not DB, since partial states need transitional flexibility).

## 2.8 Migration Strategy (EF Core)

- One `AppDbContext` for the whole app (shared schema, not per-module contexts — simpler ops for a stand-alone product).
- Migrations named per phase: `20260115_Phase1_AccountingSchema`, `20260210_Phase2_SalesSchema`, etc. — keeps migration history traceable to the roadmap.
- `dotnet ef database update` run automatically on app startup in Development; in Production, migrations are applied via an explicit deployment step (`dotnet ef database update --connection ...`) — never silently on boot, to avoid surprise schema changes on a customer's live server.
- Seed data (`08_Sample_Data.md`) applied via `IHostedService` that runs only when `Seeding:Enabled=true` in config (on for Local/Demo, off for Production).
